description: The Constrained Delaunay Mesh component generates geometry for a mesh that is a plane that can have holes cut into it, and can be free drawn.

fields.Vertices: The vertices that make up the outside edge of the plane.
fields.Holes: The holes cut into the main mesh.
fields.AutoTriangulationPlane: Whether to auto generate the triangulation plane value.
fields.TriangulationCenter: Where to attempt to center the triangulation.
fields.TriangulationPlaneNormal: The plane to align the triangulation calculation with for best fit.

methods.OnAutoComputePlane: Runs when the plane tries to auto compute the best values for generating the geometry and triangulation.
